title: USDLayer
description: A USD layer — the fundamental unit of composition in OpenUSD, representing a file or in-memory container for scene description data including prim specs, property specs, and composition arcs.

identifier.description: The unique identifier (path or URI) for this layer.

realPath.description: The resolved filesystem path for this layer.

fileFormat.description: The file format identifier for this layer.

defaultPrim.description: The default prim path to use when referencing this layer.

startTimeCode.description: The start time code for the layer's time-sampled data.

endTimeCode.description: The end time code for the layer's time-sampled data.

framesPerSecond.description: Frames per second for time code interpretation.

timeCodesPerSecond.description: Time codes per second (usually matches framesPerSecond).

metersPerUnit.description: Scene scale in meters per USD unit.

upAxis.description: The up axis convention for the scene.

subLayerPaths.description: Ordered list of sublayer paths composed by this layer.
